MainNavigation.header-text: Fitness for women online — Ladies First

hero.heading: Train at Home. Feel Strong. Be Your Best.
hero.paragraph: FIT – it's about being in shape via your health. My trainings will get you to your goal using exactly this path – being FIT and feeling great!

achievements.achievement_one: 2 x Overall World & European Champion in Fitness
achievements.achievement_two: 2 x Overall Arnold Classic Champion in Fitness
achievements.achievement_three: Artist of Cirque Du SOLEIL (22 years)

reasons.heading: My programs directions Women's Fitness online I created for us, beautiful women! WHY?
cards: Because we often find time for everyone else — except ourselves.
Train comfortably at home, whenever it fits your schedule
Just 10–45 minutes a day is enough to support your health, strength, and energy.
Each program offers different formats and training styles, choose what fits you best
Fitness programs designed for women of every generation
Full-body workouts for women — from the comfort of home.

list-items: Different fitness levels are taken into account
I explain possible mistakes and how to avoid them
You don’t need to come up with anything! I’ve done it for you.

cardio_programs.title: Ageless Fitness Course
cardio_programs.description: Designed specifically for women 55+. Full details available in the Programs section.

thematic_programs.title: Quick Fix Course
thematic_programs.description: Designed for beginners and those who don’t have much time. More details in the Programs section.

marathons.title: Training of the Day Course
marathons.description: Advanced-level program with 45–60 minute home workouts. Details in Programs

carousel-items.name: TATIANA ROMAKH
carousel-items.review: I really liked the whole package of short lessons - just what you need for beginners. Depending on the availability of time, you can take one or more classes at once or do a circuit training. Thank you and looking forward to the next more advanced course!

carousel-items.name: INNA KARIAKINA
carousel-items.review: I went through the entire course and realized that the entire left side was not working well. Thank you very much for understanding your problems. I continue on!!! The whole program is excellent, I especially like the progressive level! I feel warm and comfortable with my ego. Everything is better! I like everything!

carousel-items.name: OKSANA TKACHENKO
carousel-items.review: I have been working with Alya for several months now. I had a whole bunch of problems due to injury, sedentary work and flat feet. Before, I did everything with the wrong technique, and the wrong muscles worked. Alya shows dozens of different ways how to do it right.

carousel-items.name: OLGA GEINITZ
carousel-items.review: Alya has changed my life - I am again able to go for long walks without experiencing pain in my knees. My level is a 40+ mom without sports training, and with Alya I not only become stronger, I even move differently. Thanks a lot!

carousel-items.name: SRIA ENGH
carousel-items.review: Hello, what you do is very valuable! I devote to training, usually 30 minutes a day, and the result is already visible not only in the mirror, but also on the scales. With minimal effort, losing 6 kg in three weeks is a very good result, I think. And most importantly, it is a pleasure to work with you!

carousel-items.name: OLGA SHRUB
carousel-items.review: Wonderful! Wonderful! Yesterday I did exercises with an elastic band - this is a workout for the whole body - my mood immediately improved. Charm! Such great and detailed explanations! Such coordination. And all this in 15 minutes! I didn't think I'd find this - it's fabulous!

form.heading: Questions? Let's solve them together!
form.paragraph: Fill out the form, and I will gladly answer all your questions about training, programs or anything else related to fitness. Together we will find the best solution for you 😊

ProgramPage.heading: My programs
ProgramPage.no-programs: Programs not found or not yet created...

SingleProgramPage.warning_item2: The course will be removed from you dashboard after the expiration date
SingleProgramPage.warning_item3: The author and trainer of the course determines the order of the training sessions according to the developed method.
SingleProgramPage.warning_item4: You are free to choose your own schedule
SingleProgramPage.login-check: You need to log in or create an account to buy the course

accordion.question: Do the workouts take place at certain times?
accordion.answer: You can exercise when it’s convenient for you. You only need to set aside time during the day or evening and train regularly, repeating the exercises after the trainer and observing the correct execution technique.

accordion.question: I paid for the course, where can I access the course?
accordion.answer: Immediately after making the payment, the course will appear in your client area.

accordion.question: I forgot my password, what should I do?
accordion.answer: You can renew your password at any time on the Log in page (On the Log in page, select Forgot password?)

accordion.question: Can I exercise if I have health problems?
accordion.answer: The characteristics of your body are taken into account only in personal training. When exercising online, take into account the limitations of your body on your own, after consulting with your doctor, especially if you have acute inflammatory processes in the joints or problems of the cardiovascular system.

accordion.question: Is it possible to exercise during pregnancy or after childbirth?
accordion.answer: Most of the course exercises will be useful for both. But! This is not a SPECIALIZED course for pregnant women, as well as post-pregnancy recovery, so please consult your doctor first.

achievements.heading: Achievements
achievements.achievement-paragraph: Honored Master of Sport in Bodybuilding. • Master of Sports International Class in Sport Acrobatics •  Medal “For Courage” awarded by President of Ukraine • PRO Fitness Athlete
achievements.award-paragraph: 2x World Champion in Sport Acrobatics • 2x Absolute World Fitness Champion • 2x Arnold Classic Absolute Fitness Champion • Absolute European Fitness Champion • European Champion in Sport Acrobatics • World Games Champion in Fitness

education.heading: Education
education.card-one: Bachelor Degree Ukrainian State University of Sports and Physical Education (Sports Acrobatics, Olympic Sports)
card-two-list: National Academy of Sports Medicine USA (NASM)

career.heading: Career. SHOW BUSINESS CIRQUE DU SOLEIL
card-one-list: Artist/Acrobat at Cirque Du Soleil (21 years)
Stunt Actress in the film Wonder Woman 84
Stunt Actress in the film Oscar and the Lady in Pink
SAG Award for «Stunt Ensemble» in the film Wonder Woman 84
GRAMMY — Solo Performance representing The Beatles & Cirque Du Soleil
card-two-list: Show “LOVE” (show creation): Solo Number on Air Balloons
Show “TOTEM” (show creation): Solo Number on Gymnastic Rings, Adagio
Show “SALTIMBANKO” : Chinese Balloons, Balloons, Russian Ropes

circus.paragraph-one: My life is full of adventures and unexpected turns. But I always try to make the most of every twist and turn.
circus.paragraph-two: Whether it’s “through the thorns to the stars” in sports, or “overcoming shyness and fear”, I put my best foot forward on the Cirque Du SOLEIL stage in front of thousands of spectators. Whether it’s training during performances and preparing for Fitness Championships after the show. Or, having given birth to two daughters to return to the stage in the air. Or, having undergone several complex surgeries on the spine and hip joints, to recover and regain sports functionality.

competitions.paragraph-one: I put all of this life experience, not only in theory, but most importantly in practice, into the creation of my programs and courses.
competitions.paragraph-two: Rehabilitation component, corrective approach, creative thinking and knowledge of my subject, make my programs unique, interesting and most importantly – useful in many ways.
competitions.paragraph-three: Training with me, you are safe, as I take care of everyone who entrusted me with the most important thing you have – your health.

TermsPage.title: TERMS & CONDITIONS
intro: Welcome to AT Body by Design LLC company, owned and operated by Alevtyna Titarenko. By accessing or purchasing from www.titarenko.fit, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: 1. Use of Programs
paragraphs: All fitness programs, classes, videos, and materials provided on this website are for educational and informational purposes only.
By purchasing or using our programs, you confirm that:
list: You are at least 18 years old, or have parental consent
You will use the programs at your own risk
You will follow instructions responsibly and stop if discomfort occurs

sections.title: 2. Health Disclaimer & Assumption of Risk
paragraphs: You understand and acknowledge that:
Physical exercise involves inherent risks, including but not limited to injury, illness, falls, abnormal blood pressure, heart complications, or death.
You voluntarily assume full responsibility for any risks, injuries, or damages arising from participation.
You affirm that you are physically able and medically cleared to participate.
By using our programs, you agree that AT Body by Design LLC and Alevtyna Titarenko are not responsible for any injuries or health problems that may occur.

sections.title: 3. Not Medical Advice
paragraphs: All content provided is not medical advice and does not substitute consultation with a physician or qualified healthcare provider.
Consult your doctor before beginning any exercise program, especially if you:
list: experience dizziness, chest pain, or discomfort

sections.title: 4. Waiver & Release of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by Nevada law and applicable international laws, you hereby:

waive, release, discharge, and covenant not to sue AT Body by Design LLC, Alevtyna Titarenko, and all affiliates, instructors, employees, and representatives from any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or causes of action arising out of or related to your participation in any program or use of the website.

sections.title: 5. Results Disclaimer
paragraphs: Individual results vary.

We make no guarantees regarding weight loss, fitness level, body composition, or health outcomes. Results depend on many factors including consistency, nutrition, sleep, lifestyle, and individual physiology.

sections.title: 6. Payments & Refund Policy
paragraphs: All purchases are one-time payments.
All prices are listed in USD unless otherwise stated.
Due to the digital nature of our products, ALL SALES ARE FINAL. NO REFUNDS.
We reserve the right to modify pricing at any time.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on this website — including programs, videos, graphics, logos, text, and materials — is the exclusive property of AT Body by Design LLC.
You may not copy, reproduce, share, screen-record, resell, or distribute any content without prior written permission.
Unauthorized sharing will result in termination of access and possible legal action.

sections.title: 8. International Users
paragraphs: This website is operated from the United States. By using our services from outside the U.S., you agree that:
You are responsible for compliance with your local laws.
You use the programs at your own risk.
Any disputes will be governed by Nevada law (see below).

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, AT Body by Design LLC and Alevtyna Titarenko shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from use of the website or programs.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Nevada, United States, without regard to conflict of law principles.
